initialPrompt: A brave knight discovered a mysterious, glowing cave.
continuations: Inside, the walls were covered in ancient, pulsing runes.
He reached out to touch one, and it flared with brilliant blue light.
A vision flooded his mind: a map of a forgotten kingdom.
He knew he had to follow the map, no matter the danger.
He equipped his shield and ventured deeper into the glowing darkness.
Suddenly, he heard the sound of a low growl from the shadows ahead.
